title: Bonemealable Sugarcane
description: This Plugin allows you to use Bone Meal to grow Sugarcane just like any other crop.
body:
Hate having too mouch Gun Powder but not enough paper for your rockets? Or not having enough Sugar for your Cake Factories?

This Plugin solves exactly that Problem.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZpalxuGP/images/d9b6a7afacde48fae79d802f3fb288c97d629212.gif)

**Just drop it into your Plugins Folder and it works immediately, no Config needed.**
